pr-evidence/self-contained-benchmark-rep.gpt55_review_summary: GPT-5.5 reviewer reported no findings, verified duplicate JSON drift protection, checked docs point humans to standalone benchmark folders while keeping Databricks as release-source mirror, reran the full suite, hygiene scan, and diff check, and approved.
verification: Databricks token-pattern scan returned 0 matching files
GPT-5.5 reviewer reported no findings and APPROVED
what_changed: Copied compact sanitized vLLM, storage, and native-engine benchmark/source JSON into their dated standalone benchmark report folders.
Updated benchmark documentation so human readers start from benchmarks/vllm, benchmarks/storage, and benchmarks/native-engine while benchmarks/databricks remains a release-source mirror.
Extended governance tests so standalone benchmark JSON copies must match their Databricks mirror records byte-for-byte.
pr-evidence/self-contained-benchmark-rep.why: Benchmark reviewers need standalone human-readable report folders with compact auditable evidence, without relying on pr-evidence or Databricks scratch output as the benchmark surface.
